story_text.value: I've been using Cursor daily for six months...

title.value: Ask HN: How are you using Cursor in large monorepos?

hits.author: pollylang
hits.story_text: I've been using Cursor daily for six months in a 400k-line TypeScript monorepo. Composer is great for new code but I want to hear how others wrangle context across packages. Sharing patterns that worked and didn't.
hits.title: Ask HN: How are you using Cursor in large monorepos?
